---
title: "Statistics for Linguistics Network"
---

The **Statistics for Linguistics Network** is a community of researchers with an interest in statistical theory, including statistical concepts and methods as they pertain to language research.

The network provides a forum for researchers interested in the development, evaluation, and application of statistical approaches to language research, philosophy of statistics, the implications of statistical assumptions and analytical choices for linguistic theory and empirical inference, and statistics education in linguistics.

For more info, get in touch with Stefano Coretta at s.coretta *at* ed.ac.uk.
